title: agent-2fa — Authorization
description: Schema for an Authorization envelope returned by an Authorizer Device, per agent-2fa protocol v0.1 §7.

decision.description: Decision conveyed by the Authorizer. An 'escalate' decision requests the Verifier upgrade the Risk Level and re-issue the Challenge.

decided_at.description: MUST be no later than the Challenge.expires_at; Verifiers reject Authorizations past the Challenge window.

signature.description: ed25519 signature by authorizer_pubkey over the canonical Authorization minus 'signature'.
